title: 点滅信号、渡るべからず

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back home from my outing with Air
Groove, the walk signal up ahead starts flashing.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm. I guess we should wait.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gah, almost there! Just one last push!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That voice...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, Taiki Shuttle comes blazing past and
crosses the road in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Woohoo, by the skin of my teeth!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That was peanuts, hehe.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Taiki! Hold it right there!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Where'd you come from, Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: A blinking walk signal means don't walk! It's dangerous to rush across like that!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You need to be more aware of your surroundings!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're in the academy uniform—that means
you're an ambassador for our school.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're not just representing yourself. Everything
you say or do reflects on all the Umamusume at
our academy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Okey-dokey... I get it... Sorry.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As long as you understand, I won't lecture you
any further.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If I catch you doing that again, however, I will be asking you to write an essay reflecting on what you did. Are we clear?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: As clear as day, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having avoided a more serious scolding, Taiki
Shuttle dashes off into the distance.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I hope she takes what I said to heart.
choice_data_list: You really stick to your principles.
You really stick to your principles.

Seeing the light blink makes me wanna rush
across too.

Seeing the light blink makes me wanna rush
across too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I hope she takes what I said to heart.
choice_data_list: You really stick to your principles.
You really stick to your principles.

Seeing the light blink makes me wanna rush
across too.

Seeing the light blink makes me wanna rush
across too.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Umamusume have physical capabilities
vastly superior to those of humans.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What may just be a little bump for us could
seriously injure someone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We must be constantly vigilant of our bearings in
order to prevent any unnecessary accidents.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I would hate to stir up ill will between
Umamusume and humans, after all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove nods to herself as she speaks—her
words are resolute.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What, you too?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, then that badge of yours is nothing but a
meaningless trinket!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're meant to set a good example for the
students at the academy! Gah, let's just go!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You'd better prepare yourself for an earful once
we get back. You have to take your role as a
trainer more seriously!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Air Groove delivers a painfully
long lecture upon our arrival.
